title: Toggle Between Migration and Dictionary Views
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to toggle between Migration and Dictionary views on the object detail page, so that I can focus on data mapping or field definitions depending on my current task.
description:
The object detail page displays Salesforce field-level data in a table. Users need the ability to switch between two view modes — Migration and Dictionary — each showing a different subset of columns relevant to that workflow.

A menu control at the top of the page toggles column visibility. The active view is also controllable via URL query parameter (`view=migration` or `view=dictionary`), enabling direct linking to the desired view. Version 1 defaults to the Migration view.

URL format: `https://ourwebapp/app/dictionary?object=leads&view=migration`
acceptance_criteria: A toggle control at the top of the page switches between Migration and Dictionary views
Migration view shows only migration-relevant columns as defined in documentation
Dictionary view shows only dictionary-relevant columns as defined in documentation
URL parameter `view=migration` loads the Migration view directly
URL parameter `view=dictionary` loads the Dictionary view directly
Default view is Migration when no view parameter is specified
Toggle control uses Bootstrap nav-style tabs instead of a dropdown
ux_changes: Adds a Bootstrap nav-style toggle control at the top of the object detail page with Migration and Dictionary options. Switching views dynamically shows/hides the appropriate column set. Initially implemented as a dropdown, later refined to use Bootstrap menu tabs per feedback.
middleware_changes: Server reads the `view` URL parameter to determine which column configuration to render. Defaults to migration if parameter is missing.
implementation_notes: Initially implemented as a dropdown selector, then updated to Bootstrap nav-style tabs based on product feedback. The view parameter is passed as a URL query string alongside the object parameter.
comment_summary: Developer implemented a dropdown initially. Product requested switching to Bootstrap menu tabs for cleaner UX. Developer updated the control and the change was approved.
